decisions.decision: UI-SPEC force-approved with spacing block override
decisions.rationale: 20px/30px are Ghostty pixel-perfect constants that cannot be rounded to 4px grid without breaking layout match. Documented as Pixel-Perfect Ghostty Constants outside the spacing contract.
SVG-only favicons for v1; PNG variants deferred. Confirmed in RESEARCH.md open questions.

next_action: Run /gsd-execute-phase 3 in a fresh context window
context_notes: Phase 3 planning is fully complete. 4 plans in 2 waves. Wave 1 (03-01, 03-02, 03-03) runs in parallel — root layout/homepage, docs pages/404/MDX map, docs content/assets. Wave 2 (03-04) is a human verification checkpoint. All 17 requirement IDs covered. Research, pattern map, and UI-SPEC all committed.
